report.summary: Cycle 2 standup (Mar 28 evening). BTC $66,000–$66,194 (flat since morning, $66K support holding). ETH $1,976–$1,997 (sub-$2K day 3+). F&G 12 (Extreme Fear, 49+ day streak). All 6 agents completed first full rotation today ($497 human-equiv). 273 uncommitted files (+2 from eod). Deploy remains P0 for 12th consecutive cycle. SEC Mar 27 ruling results still mixed — 91 apps across 24 tokens, outcomes emerging gradually. March ETF inflows slowed to $890M (vs $3.3B Feb).

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,000–$66,194. Flat since morning standup ($66,008–$66,350). Testing critical $66K support for 2nd day. Down 24.6% YTD, 48% from Oct 2025 ATH. Iran/geopolitical tensions remain primary macro headwind. Institutional holders reportedly absorbing supply at these levels.
ETH: $1,976–$1,997. Sub-$2K for 3rd+ consecutive day. ETH/BTC at 0.0301 (lowest since Feb 2024). Market cap ~$233B. $253M mystery whale accumulation since Mar 1.

F&G INDEX: 12 (Extreme Fear). 49+ consecutive days — longest streak since post-FTX Oct 2022. BTC dominance rising to 55.9% = classic risk-off rotation. Historically, sustained sub-15 readings precede 30-90 day reversals with median +38.4% BTC return.

ETF FLOWS: March total $890M (sharp decline from Feb's record $3.3B). $1.47B inflows Mar 9-17, then $129M outflow on FOMC day (Mar 18). Significant reallocation toward tokenized RWAs — especially U.S. Treasury products. Combined AUM ~$128B across all U.S. spot BTC ETFs.

SEC ETF RULING (Mar 27): 91 applications across 24 tokens had final deadline. Results emerging gradually — not a single big announcement. XRP spot ETFs already live ($1.44B cumulative inflows). SOL/LTC staking ETFs trading. 16 tokens classified as digital commodities (Mar 17). Remaining approvals/extensions/rejections still trickling out.

DELTA FROM LAST CYCLE (eod): BTC stable ($66K range unchanged). ETH stable (sub-$2K unchanged). F&G unchanged at 12. Uncommitted files 271→273 (+2, community draft assets). No new commits. No new pages published. Market in holding pattern.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 2 OF MARCH 28. First full rotation (all 6 agents) completed earlier today. This standup opens cycle 2. Yesterday (Mar 27) completed 9 full rotations across 47 agent runs totaling ~$3,795 human-equiv.

WHAT SHIPPED TODAY (CYCLE 1): 2 new learn guides (Citrea Bitcoin ZK rollup, Unichain Uniswap L2) built with full SEO. 2 pages promoted from queue (Railgun privacy DeFi, No-code AI trading agents). 4 OG images created. UX fixes on 2 pages. 4 social posts drafted (#211-216 w/ whale accumulation narrative). Newsletter v35. 2 SVG social cards. All 6 automated reports written.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) Deploy — 273 uncommitted files (242 untracked + 31 modified), 12th cycle flagging P0. (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx. (4) 142 TS errors in 5 files (stable). (5) 17 duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (cosmetic). (6) Full build OOM (Bus error) — Vercel should handle but untested.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b. No new commits since. 273 files pending (was 157 at Mar 27 day-start → 250 end of Mar 27 → 257 Mar 28 morning → 271 eod → 273 now). All changes additive.
PUBLISHED PAGES: 577 live (was 556 at morning standup — community report updated count). Content velocity: ~4 pages/day average this week.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 12th CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 273 uncommitted files. This is now a 2-day backlog spanning 7+ full agent rotations. Every learn page, OG image, UX fix, and promoted page from 50+ agent runs is invisible to production. Google cannot index, users cannot see. One git commit + Vercel push unlocks everything. Jefe: this is the single highest-leverage 5-minute action possible.

PRIORITY 2 — SEC RULING REACTIVE CONTENT: Mar 27 was the biggest ETF decision day in crypto history. Results are still emerging but the news window is NOW. Build: 'SEC March 27 ETF Ruling: Full Breakdown', 'Which Crypto ETFs Got Approved in 2026', 'What SOL/LTC/DOGE ETF Decisions Mean'. Every hour of delay = lost search intent capture.

PRIORITY 3 — EXTREME FEAR + WHALE NARRATIVE: F&G at 12 for 49+ days while 270K BTC whale accumulation is the biggest since 2013. This divergence (smart money buying while retail panics) is a powerful content narrative. Our whale tracker, fear-greed timeline, and DCA calculator are already top performers — double down with fresh guides and social amplification.
